commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Discord trusted-requester gating and guild-admin permission checks for privileged message actions, with focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main routes guild-admin actions through Discord without requiresTrustedRequesterSender and then runs bot-credentialed guild mutations without requester permission checks; the PR regression is also source-reproducible through openclaw message paths that carry senderIsOwner but no requesterSenderId.
